expectations.evidence: Lines 4-10 only define raw ANSI codes (RED, GREEN, YELLOW, BLUE, CYAN, NC); no semantic aliases like COLOR_SUCCESS
Lines 178-182 use numbered menu (1), 2), 3), 4), 5)) with no chevron focus indicators
Tables use hardcoded printf format strings (%-25s, %-30s) without pre-declared column width variables
Lines 70-72 in awk truncate filesystem name before color; lines 69-72 handle truncation with '...' suffix
No trap handler defined; script doesn't restore terminal state
Line 1 is shebang only; no 'set -euo pipefail'
No animation frames, no sleep delays in loops; only static output
No --dry-run flag parsing; not requested for eval-1
Output uses 2-space indent inconsistently; some lines use '  ' but others use no indent or variable spacing (line 38, 40, 45)
